product_updates.title: The AI world is getting ‘loopy’
product_updates.content: The loop takes agentic AI a step further by authorizing a swarm of agents to work continuously in the background, endlessly.

product_updates.title: AI chipmaker Groq confirms $650M raise, re-staffs after Nvidia’s $20B not-acqui-hire deal
product_updates.content: What does an AI company do after one of those not-acqui-hire deals? Groq raised money, is leaning into its neocloud business, and is hiring new execs.

product_updates.title: Nvidia wants to cut data center water use, but that’s not the same as fixing AI’s water problem
product_updates.content: Nvidia announced a new cooling system that cuts water use inside the data center. But it does nothing to address AI's biggest water use — fossil fuel power plants.

product_updates.title: Google DeepMind bets $75M on AI’s future in Hollywood with A24 deal
product_updates.content: Google DeepMind and A24 are teaming up to build AI filmmaking tools.

product_updates.title: Amazon is testing Alexa+ in India with Hindi support
product_updates.content: Amazon is planning to increase the footprint of its new conversational AI assistant Alexa+ to India and is inviting users in the country to test out a Hindi-language version.

product_updates.title: SpaceX inks compute deal with Reflection AI, an open source AI lab
product_updates.content: Reflection AI will pay $150 million a month beginning July 1, 2026 through 2029 for immediate access to Nvidia's latest GB300 AI chips and supporting hardware across SpaceX's Colossus 2 data center near Memphis, Tennessee.

product_updates.title: The founder conference built for growth: TechCrunch Founder Summit pass rates increase June 26
product_updates.content: Save up to $190 on your pass to TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026 by June 26, 11:59 p.m. PT. Designed for founders first on November 4 in Boston. Register today.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Following user outcry, AMD reinstates memory encryption in consumer CPUs
technical_breakthroughs.content: Critics saw the move as an underhanded way to steer them toward more costly chips.

technical_breakthroughs.content: This story originally appeared in The Algorithm, our weekly newsletter on AI. To get stories like this in your inbox first, sign up here. technical_breakthroughs.title: Inside the world’s deepest and longest subsea road tunnel
technical_breakthroughs.content: It’s cold, it’s very, very noisy, and—if I can be quite honest with you—I’m not feeling super relaxed.
